subject: CAT1 Tests Reminder
body:
CAT1 Reminder - Daily Alert

This is an automated reminder that a CAT1 test is due.

Building: 123 Example Road
Device: B-4 #731842
Test Type: CAT1 Full Load Safety Test
Date Logged: 14 May 2026

Please ensure the scheduled CAT1 test is completed and results are submitted to the regulator within the required timeframe.

If you have already completed this test, please disregard this notice and update the system accordingly.

This alert will continue to be sent daily until the test record is submitted.

Regards,
Automated Compliance System

subject: CAT5 Tests Reminder
body:
CAT5 Reminder - Daily Alert

This is an automated reminder that a CAT5 test is due.

Building: 456 Sample Street
Device: S-1 #492706
Test Type: CAT5 Full Load Overspeed Safety Test
Date Logged: 02 Sep 2022

The CAT5 test for this device is overdue. Immediate action is required to schedule and complete the required safety test.

Please coordinate with the assigned contractor and submit results as soon as possible.

This alert will continue to be sent daily until the test record is submitted.

Regards,
Automated Compliance System

subject: Maintenance Data is not up to date
body:
Data Absence Alert

Maintenance data has never been submitted for the following device.

Building: 789 Demo Avenue
Contractor: Example Elevator Contractor Ltd.
Status: No maintenance records have ever been submitted for this device.

This device appears to have no maintenance history on record. Please contact the contractor immediately to investigate and submit all outstanding maintenance records.

Action Required:
- Verify contractor assignment
- Request immediate submission of all maintenance records
- Escalate if no response within 48 hours

This alert will continue to be sent daily until maintenance data is submitted.

Regards,
Automated Compliance System

subject: Maintenance Data is not up to date
body:
Data Absence Alert

Maintenance data is significantly out of date for the following device.

Building: 321 Placeholder Boulevard
Last Activity: 15-Oct-2025
Elapsed: 203 days since last maintenance record

The most recent maintenance record for this device is 203 days old. This exceeds the acceptable threshold for maintenance data currency.

Action Required:
- Contact the assigned contractor to determine reason for data gap
- Request submission of all outstanding maintenance records
- If contractor is unresponsive, escalate to management

This alert will continue to be sent daily until maintenance data is brought up to date.

Regards,
Automated Compliance System

subject: Maintenance Hours Less Than Required
body:
Maintenance Hours Shortfall Alert

The following building has maintenance hours below the required threshold for the current period.

Building: 654 Example Lane
Period: May 2026

Hours Summary:
  Car 1: Required 1.50 hrs | Actual 0.00 hrs | Shortfall: 1.50 hrs
  Car 2: Required 1.50 hrs | Actual 0.25 hrs | Shortfall: 1.25 hrs
  Car 3: Required 1.50 hrs | Actual 0.00 hrs | Shortfall: 1.50 hrs

Total Required: 4.50 hrs
Total Actual: 0.25 hrs
Total Shortfall: 4.25 hrs

Please contact the maintenance contractor to arrange catch-up visits and ensure compliance with the maintenance schedule.

Regards,
Automated Compliance System

subject: Scheduled Work is Overdue or Outstanding
body:
Major Scheduled Work Overdue Alert

The following major scheduled work item is overdue and requires immediate attention.

Building: 987 Sample Road
Device: Service Car #604118
Scheduled Date: 12-Mar-2026
Work Description: Replace worn drive sheave
Status: Overdue

This critical maintenance item was scheduled for 12-Mar-2026 and has not been completed or updated. Drive sheave replacement is a safety-critical task and its delay may affect device compliance status.

Action Required:
- Contact contractor to determine current status
- Reschedule if required with immediate priority
- Obtain written confirmation of completion date
- Flag for compliance review if further delayed

Regards,
Automated Compliance System

subject: Outstanding Government Directive - Daily Alert
body:
Outstanding Government Directive Alert

The following device has outstanding government directives that require action.

Building: 246 Example Street
Device: 2 #514903
Compliance Due Date: 20-Apr-2026

Outstanding Tasks:
1. Brake-monitoring adjustment - Required by government directive
2. Emergency lighting installation/upgrade - Required by government directive

These directives are now overdue as of the due date above. Immediate action is required to achieve compliance.

Action Required:
- Schedule contractor visit within 7 days
- Complete all listed directive items
- Submit compliance documentation to regulator
- Notify building owner of directive status

This alert will continue to be sent daily until all directive items are resolved.

Regards,
Automated Compliance System
